news.title: Why Today’s Retirees May Need More Stocks Than Their Parents Did
news.summary: A comfortable American retirement now runs closer to $70,000 a year than the figures your parents used. news.title: Why Paying Off Your Mortgage Early May Be A Retirement Mistake
news.summary: The standard retirement script says pay off the mortgage before you retire. The logic is simple: eliminate the biggest monthly bill and retirement becomes easier to fund.
